name: John's Maple Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls, approximately walnut-sized.
3. Refrigerate for one to two hours (or longer if making ahead of serving time).
4. Optionally, roll the cooled candy in finely shredded coconut or chopped pecans and place on wax paper-lined cookie sheets until completely chilled.
5. This recipe makes about 5 dozen pieces.
